name: Inspection
text: The Buyer shall have the right to inspect the Goods upon delivery to ascertain their conformity with the specifications and terms of this Agreement.

legal_basis.note: Buyer's right to examine goods before acceptance
Acceptance by conduct — waiver of rejection

invalid_if: Exclusion of buyer's statutory right to examine goods
Imposition of an unreasonably short period for inspection
title: Inspection
dispute_hotspots: Waiver of right to reject — SGA 1930 S.42: accepting goods after reasonable time bars rejection
Hidden defects — inspection period for latent defects must be adequate
Third party inspection costs — who bears if goods pass inspection
